name: Trusted domain information was modified
definition: Windows Security Event ID 4716 records Trusted domain information was modified.
trigger_scenarios: Windows logs the event when the audited security operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: Trust Direction and Trust Attributes changes can expand authentication paths; an attribute value enabling SIDHistory or disabling quarantine requires change-ticket validation.
The initiating account and Logon ID support attribution and correlation to 4624 and 4688.
The affected host determines the operational impact.

false_positives: Documented maintenance, policy changes, or approved administration can generate this event.
Validate change control and host role before suppressing.
detection_notes: Trust Direction and Trust Attributes changes can expand authentication paths; an attribute value enabling SIDHistory or disabling quarantine requires change-ticket validation. This is a T1484.002 Domain Policy Modification: Trust Modification signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the actor, process, and related events. Review the change against the approved baseline in a window=60 minute correlation period.
kql_snippet:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4716
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account
